user_goal: Publish GitHub source release v1.1.1 with pre-release security scan gate; commit, push, tag, and create Release.
acceptance_items: gitleaks worktree + full history security scan PASS recorded in progress
unit tests and release/control-plane validators PASS
origin/main, tag v1.1.1, and GitHub Release point at the same commit
Release notes do not claim marketplace/G5 UAT; security PASS not claimed as product UAT

startup_baseline.summary: git status --short at package build time

commands_run: git push origin main && git push origin v1.1.1 && gh release create v1.1.1
results: main/tag/release all at 8110153; Release published non-draft
worker_verification.deviations: Full-history gitleaks without max-target-megabytes hung ~1GB RSS; used --max-target-megabytes 5 to skip >5MB baseline graph dumps; documented in progress.

blocking_criteria: 违反用户明确目标、验收项或审查包范围
可复现功能错误、数据/安全风险、控制面状态错误
任务要求但缺失的验证证据
审查包缺字段或边界无法确认
non_blocking_hints: 不影响当前验收的历史问题
